assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Phase 1: Control plane upgrade' and includes the command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --master' with note '(required)'

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides clear sequence: Phase 2 coordinating (least critical), Phase 3 data (most critical), Phase 4 master (maintain quorum), with specific rationales for each

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Lists 'Regional PVs protect against zone failures during upgrade' as a key risk mitigation and mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (good for availability)' in overview

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for master nodes with comment '# Allow 1 master down (quorum = 2/3)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly configures '--max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0' for all three node pools (coordinating, master, and data)

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple health checks including 'curl -X GET elasticsearch-service:9200/_cluster/health' after each phase and monitoring until GREEN status in post-upgrade section

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain anywhere in the response

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides various kubectl commands for monitoring nodes and pods but does not include specific 'kubectl rollout status' commands for StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes specific snapshot command 'curl -X PUT elasticsearch-service:9200/_snapshot/my_backup_repo/pre_upgrade_snapshot' in pre-upgrade checklist
